context: Evaluates the agent's ability to generate complete multi-tool config from a set of conventions.

checklist.name: All conventions mapped to correct tool
checklist.description: Each convention maps to the right tool: ESLint, Prettier, or TypeScript

checklist.name: Config entries correct
checklist.description: The generated config values are correct for each tool

checklist.name: Dependencies mentioned
checklist.description: Required packages (eslint-plugin-vue, etc.) are called out
